question_text: Which of the following is an example of useful friction?

options.label: A
options.text: Friction between ice and a skate blade

options.label: B
options.text: Friction between a shoe and the ground when walking

options.label: C
options.text: Friction between car parts in an engine

options.label: D
options.text: Friction between a book and a slippery desk

explanation: Useful friction between a shoe and the ground helps us grip and prevents us from slipping when we walk. The other examples show friction that we usually want to reduce, like in ice skating or engines.
